message: ODU section already exists at line 123 of traducao-areas.ts as ODU_DETALHADO: Record<Area, {requer_terreiro, explicacao, convergencia, tensao, evitar, pratica}>. Task template expected a name/keywords/contextPatterns (RegExp[]) section that does not exist in this file — ASTROLOGIA_DETALHADO uses Record<Area, {explicacao, convergencia, tensao, evitar, pratica}>, not a tradition-detection array. Grep across the entire repo confirms 0 occurrences of 'contextPatterns' or 'name:.*keywords' in any .ts file. No commit made: adding a duplicate ODU_DETALHADO or inventing a non-existent pattern would be incorrect. Recommend updating the akasha-evolution-loop.py template to match the actual structure, or sourcing missing_tradition data from a different file.
